name: SMS Gateway
description: Send and receive SMS via sms-gate.app

username.label: Username
username.help: Username from sms-gate.app Cloud Server settings

password.label: Password
password.help: Password from sms-gate.app Cloud Server settings

publicUrl.label: Public URL
publicUrl.help: Publicly reachable base URL for webhook delivery (e.g. via Cloudflare Tunnel, Tailscale, or ngrok)

webhookSecret.label: Webhook Secret
webhookSecret.help: HMAC-SHA256 secret for verifying webhook signatures

apiUrl.label: API URL
apiUrl.help: Base URL for the sms-gate.app API. Change only if using a local/private server.

defaultSimNumber.label: Default SIM Number
defaultSimNumber.help: SIM slot to use for sending (1 or 2). Default: 1

webhookPath.label: Webhook Path
webhookPath.help: HTTP path for incoming webhooks. Default: /plugins/sms-gateway/webhook

retentionMinutes.label: Retention Time (minutes)
retentionMinutes.help: Prune messages older than this many minutes. Unset = keep forever.

retentionMaxMessages.label: Retention Max Messages
retentionMaxMessages.help: Maximum number of messages to keep per store (inbox/sent). Unset = no limit.
